package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for updates_with_struct_used_for_patch_without_field_intent_helper: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: PATCH-style repository writes that rely on struct zero-value semantics without explicit field intent.
type CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperModel
}

type CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperService struct {
    repo *CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelper(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperDTO) error {
    focus := "updates_with_struct_used_for"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseUpdatesWithStructUsedForPatchWithoutFieldIntentHelperModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative := map[string]int{"updates": 1, "struct": 2, "used": 3, "patch": 4, "field": 5, "intent": 6}
    updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    updates_negative_0 := updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["updates"] + len(input)
    _ = updates_negative_0
    struct_negative_1 := updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_negative_1
    used_negative_2 := updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["used"] + len(input)
    _ = used_negative_2
    patch_negative_3 := updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["patch"] + len(input)
    _ = patch_negative_3
    field_negative_4 := updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["field"] + len(input)
    _ = field_negative_4
    intent_negative_5 := updates_struct_used_patch_field_negative["intent"] + len(input)
    _ = intent_negative_5
    return nil
}
